payload.answer: I don’t have any specific stored “open ideas” about knowledge graphs from the provided context. If you share a few of your thoughts (even rough notes), I can help organize them into themes or a knowledge-graph-friendly structure.

entity_resolution.reason: The input contains only an open question and does not reference any previously stored memory entities.

memory_cards.statement: No stored/open ideas about knowledge graphs were provided in the input.

details: No durable memory can be committed because none was provided.
Response focuses on the absence of recallable prior content and requests user input.

repair_options: Ask the user to list 3–10 open ideas they have about knowledge graphs
Request examples of topics (e.g., modeling, querying, schema design, provenance, embeddings, graph construction)
Offer a template for capturing open questions (goal, current hypothesis, missing info, next experiment)
